title: Matter trace precheck
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S04 engineering deliverable GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Three P3 notes were optional informational observations and explicitly deferred because the substantive S04 guarantees are preserved by the inherited S03 gate, S04's unique matter_tenant_without_matter rule, Matter-required denial, defense-in-depth result validator, and no-write/no-runtime boundaries.

findings.title: Two blocked claim refs are defense-in-depth through S04 entrypoint
findings.summary: Claude noted that matter_tenant_missing and matter_tenant_mismatch are unreachable through the S04 public entrypoint because the S03 input assertion rejects those malformed tenant/Matter shapes first.
findings.resolution: Deferred as intentional defense-in-depth. S04's result validator still rejects those shapes if a hand-authored result attempts to encode them, while the executable S04 path actively emits matter_required_missing and matter_tenant_without_matter.

findings.title: Two Matter pair-drift tests verify inherited S03 validation
findings.summary: Claude noted that two pair-drift assert.throws cases are satisfied by S03 validator messages before the S04 function body runs.
findings.resolution: Deferred as acceptable inherited gate coverage. S04 depends on a validated S03 tenant-boundary result, and the S04-specific matter_tenant_without_matter deny path remains directly tested through the public S04 entrypoint.

findings.title: Model effort read-only negative coverage is transitive
findings.summary: Claude noted that S04's model, effort, and read-only re-check has no dedicated S04 negative test because the S03 input validator already covers those fields.
findings.resolution: Deferred as harmless defense-in-depth on a security boundary. S04 carries the already-validated S03 metadata and reasserts the same constraints without adding runtime authority.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json

findings.title: Defense-in-depth blocked refs
findings.summary: matter_tenant_missing and matter_tenant_mismatch are unreachable through the S04 entrypoint because S03 rejects those shapes first, but S04 still protects hand-authored results.

findings.title: Inherited pair-drift test coverage
findings.summary: Two pair-drift throw cases verify S03's upstream validator before S04 execution; the S04-unique matter_tenant_without_matter deny path is directly tested.

findings.title: Transitive model effort read-only negative coverage
findings.summary: S04 repeats model, effort, and read-only checks already enforced by S03; this remains defense-in-depth.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M04.S05 Permission precheck as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed S04 consumes the S03 tenant-boundary result and preserves S01, S02, and RP00.P02.M03.S20 dependencies.
Claude confirmed Matter-required claims without Matter context fail closed with a canonical blocked ref.
Claude confirmed matter_id null plus matter_tenant_id set fails closed with S04's unique matter_tenant_without_matter rule.
Claude confirmed no runtime Claude invocation, no review queue writes, no audit writes, no service execution, no runtime route creation, and no product-state write.
Claude confirmed RP00.P02.M04 stays open and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S05.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO and no P0/P1/P2 issues. P3 notes are optional hardening or inherited-gate observations.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and three P3 optional informational notes.
